# CANLAH AI — llms.txt
# https://canlah.ai

> CANLAH AI builds intelligent AI agents for marketing, sales, service, and commerce. Our core technology, Style Genome™, encodes brand identity into a 768-dimensional memory vector that ensures every AI-generated output is on-brand.

## Products

- [CanMarket](https://app.canmarket.ai): AI Marketing Agent with brand memory. Generates brand-consistent content at scale using Style Genome™. Free tier available.
- CanService: AI Customer Service Agent (coming soon). Omnichannel support with sentiment-aware escalation.
- CanSales: AI Sales Agent (coming soon). Lead scoring, pipeline automation, AI follow-up sequences.
- CanCommerce: AI Commerce Agent (coming soon). Listing optimization, ad campaigns, conversion analytics.

## Key Technology

- **Style Genome™**: Encodes brand identity into a 768-dimensional vector space. Every output is scored via cosine similarity (0.85 threshold) against the brand vector. 97% pass rate by attempt 3.
- **Multi-Model Routing**: Intelligently selects GPT, Gemini, or Claude for each task.
- **Agent Orchestration**: Multi-step reasoning across agents with automated decision routing.

## Company

- Founded: 2024
- Headquarters: Singapore
- Contact: hello@canlah.ai
- Clients: Haleon, Starbucks, ByteDance, Alibaba Cloud, Publicis, McCann
- Achievement: MWC Pitch2Pitch 2025 Global Runner-up (3,000+ startups)
- Revenue: $280K+ in first 7 months

## Blog Topics

- Brand memory vs generic AI content
- Style Genome™ technical architecture
- Agency vs AI platform cost comparison
- DTC brand marketing automation
- Multi-agent marketing systems
- Enterprise AI content strategy

## Pricing

- Starter: Free forever, 50 generations/month, no credit card required
- Growth: Credit-based pay-as-you-go, unlimited generations
- Enterprise: Custom pricing, dedicated CSM, SSO, on-prem available
